mountPolicy.description:
Controls how the module is mounted in pods.
`Always` (default): CSI volume + volumeMount on all declared containers + env vars.
`Debug`: CSI volume only — no volumeMount or env on declared containers.
  Only accessible via ephemeral debug containers (`kubectl cfgd debug`).

CosignSignature.description: Cosign configuration for OCI artifact signature verification.

certificateIdentity.description: Certificate identity pattern for keyless verification (regex).

certificateOidcIssuer.description: Certificate OIDC issuer pattern for keyless verification (regex).

keyless.description: Enable keyless verification via Fulcio/Rekor (OIDC identity-based).

publicKey.description: PEM-encoded public key for static key verification.

ModuleEnvVar.description: An environment variable set by a Module.

ModuleFileSpec.description: A file managed by a Module.

ModuleScripts.description: Scripts that run during module lifecycle.

ModuleSignature.description: Signature configuration for a Module's OCI artifact.

MountPolicy.description: Controls how a module is exposed to pod containers.

oneOf.description: Mount into all declared containers with volumeMount and env vars.

Stage the CSI volume on the pod but do not mount into declared containers.
Only accessible via ephemeral debug containers.

PackageEntry.description: An entry in a Module's package list with optional per-platform overrides.
